---
title: "My First Quarto Document"
author: "Atoyebi Opeyemi"
format: 
    html:
        embed-resources: true
---

# Section 1
Hello

This a text with *italics* and **bold**
##level 2 heading

The body of the *document* consists of text that follows the **Markdown** syntax

### level 3 heading

You can defined bulleted lists as follows:
-first element

-second element

-third element


#Section 2
World

## Visit our website

The SI Analytics [website] (https://www.sianalytics.com/) is a great resource for learning data science and analytics.


```{python}
2 + 2
```

# Displaying a dataframe
```{python}
import plotly as px
import plotly.express as px
from itables import show

```

```{python}
show(px.data.tips())
```

# Displaying a plot

```{python}
tips = px.data.tips()
show(tips)
```

```{python}
tips_sex = px.violin(tips, y="total_bill", x="day", color="sex")

tips_sex.show()
```

```{python}
tips_day = px.violin(tips, y="total_bill", x="day", color="day")

tips_day.show()
```

```{python}
tips_sex.write_image("tips_sex_plot.png")
```
